result.stdout:
ULinkRPC.CodeGen usage:
  ulinkrpc-codegen [options]

Options:
  --contracts <path>      Path to contract sources
  --output <path>         Output directory for generated files
  --namespace <ns>        Namespace for generated Unity code
  --server-output <path>  Output directory for server binders
  --server-namespace <ns> Namespace for server binders
  --mode <unity|server>   Generation mode (optional if current directory can be auto-detected)

Defaults:
  unity: output defaults to Assets/Scripts/Rpc/RpcGenerated under Unity project root.
  unity: namespace defaults to value derived from output path.
  server: output defaults to ./Generated
